pullRequest.title: DOM-74899 Populate taxonomy tag labels and descriptions in App search index

nodes.body: how are tags added to apps?

a little more color: i think maybe "tagging apps" used to be a sort of broken functionality before the apps refresh for domino 6.1.0, and during that i believe we did not refactor/modernize the app tagging functionality, so im not aware of a way to tag apps in the UI today
Ah, sorry, should have given more context. For the new tagging microservice we've created, users can add tags to apps. This will call our microservice to fetch the tags for given apps
